segments.text: But then Nikita, it's not going to work out, and Leo just gets a throw into the grappling hook, see how he opts to play this vertical advantage, another grab, almost killing with it, but the grappling hook on the top.

full_text: But then Nikita, it's not going to work out, and Leo just gets a throw into the grappling hook, see how he opts to play this vertical advantage, another grab, almost killing with it, but the grappling hook on the top.
